about.title: Quality and Experience
about.p1: IS-Autopaint Oy specializes in collision damage and plastic part repairs. We have long-term experience in the industry and use only the best materials and latest technology.
about.p2: Our goal is to restore damaged vehicles to their original condition as quickly as possible without compromising quality.
